title: Filter by Files (assets) Column type in Items and Subitems in board filters
excerpt:
I’d like monday.com to support columns of type Files (assets) in the filter functionality (funil icon in board table views) for both items and subitems. 
The options should be at least “is empty” and “is not empty”, but …

posts.author: enanni (Edi Nanni)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like monday.com to support columns of type Files (assets) in the filter functionality (funil icon in board table views) for both items and subitems.

The options should be at least “is empty” and “is not empty”, but could support “name contains…”, “name does not contain…” etc.

Why? Try to find only tasks and subtasks where your team put some file in as much as 20 boards with hundreds of items each and you will see why.
